Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.
Micheal Lee for Bernadette Tyler.

Mr. Lee stated that his Client has no opposition. Mr. Der stated that he filed a supplement, that the only asset is the property, that there are no cash accounts and that he thinks a minimum bond of $10,000.00 is sufficient. Mr. Der also stated that what they are trying to do is distribute the property, that he believes the value of the property may be in the two millions, that they are not sure what condition the property is in and suggested that any sale of the property be done with Court confirmation. The Court granted the Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order). The Court orders bond at $1,500,000.00.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Z. Grimaldi. Not reported.
